data.content: Needs changes: beat detail still renders full aliases instead of the natural beat id required by the spec. Current code keeps raw aliases in src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx and the test in src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts still expects ['aa57','project-aa57'] instead of only the natural alias id. Sanity gates are also not green: bun run test failed in src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts with 'infers parent from hierarchical dotted alias when id has no dots'.
